channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 24 Jul: Harare overcast · high 25° / low 10°
item.description: Harare: high 25°, low 10° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 25°, low 13° (clear sky) · Mutare: high 25°, low 9° (mainly clear) · Gweru: high 25°, low 12° (partly cloudy) · Masvingo: high 26°, low 11° (overcast) · Victoria Falls: high 28°, low 12° (mainly clear) Tsumo yezuva: Mviromviro yemhanza mapfeka. (Big events announce themselves with early signs.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
